description_long: This handcart features a rectangular wooden cargo bed with vertical slats forming side barriers, providing containment for transported goods. The cart is supported by four large, spoked wooden wheels, two on each side, which are attached to the frame with visible axles. The front of the cart extends into a pair of long, straight wooden handles, designed for manual pulling or pushing. The load platform consists of closely spaced wooden planks, offering a sturdy and flat surface for carrying items. The overall construction is robust, with metal reinforcements visible at the wheel hubs and along the frame. The wood is finished in a natural, light brown color, giving the cart a rustic and utilitarian appearance suitable for urban or rural environments.
description: A sturdy wooden handcart with four large spoked wheels, vertical side slats, and long front handles for manual transport. The flat plank platform and reinforced frame give it a rustic, functional look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the handcart, all four wheels, and the long front handles.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the dual handles and the width of the cargo bed, with wheels visible on either side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the side slats, wheels, and handles.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the open back of the cargo bed and the alignment of the wheels.
